Types of Prelaunch Content
Module 4
Important…
• Horses for courses
• Different types of Prelaunch Content are right
for different situations
• What you use depends on your situation and on
your assets
Important…
• Video is really great for lots of situations
• Your launch will do best if you put forward a
human face
• It’s an advantage smaller businesses have is
that we’re human and people can build a
connection with us
• You want to avoid ”airline” speak
• In video your personality shines through
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Important…
• It’s about progress, not perfection
• Every launch I do I get better than the previous
launch
• And my next launch will be even better (and so
will yours)
Types of Prelaunch Content
• Screencap video
• Using software to record your screen (like this
video)
• Full motion (or live) video
• (talking head, or direct to camera)
Types of Prelaunch Content
• Audio
• PDF report
• Webinar or teleseminar
• Software
